title: sphaerocionium frankliniae
intro: Sphaerocionium frankliniae, also known as Franklin's jelly leaf, is a type of lichen that grows on trees and rocks in tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sphaerocionium frankliniae include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Sphaerocionium frankliniae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
